reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.6.0: canvas rendering rework. Tiles are now screen-space bounded so memory stays flat (24 MB) from 100% to 800% zoom instead of ballooning to 576 MB and failing silently at 200%+. Object render sizes are clamped, tile render failures are logged instead of swallowed, and a per-layer spatial index replaces the full object scan per tile, making canvases with many objects about 11x faster to render.
